creator: numisemis@yahoo.com
text:
This patch adds support for Option (http://www.option.com) series of USB
modems that identify itself as "Option GlobeTrotter 3G+". I have seen a
similar patch for OpenBSD.

Tested using "Option GlobeSurfer Icon" (which by default shows as a mass
storage device, and has to be switched first to a modem by sending
switchover commands to the device (see icon_switch.c:
http://www.google.hrsearch?hl=hr&q=icon_switch.c&btnG=Google+pretraga&meta=)
and then attached by ubsa driver.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
